title: Never Be Enough
prompt: Translate the following lyrics into your local language and practice pronunciation.
hint: Focus on expressing the emotions in the song while translating.
sample: I'm trying to hold my breath, Let it stay this way.

zh.prompt: 將以下歌詞翻譯成你的母語並練習發音。
zh.hint: 翻譯時著重表達歌曲中的情感。
zh.sample: 我試著屏住呼吸，讓這一刻停留。
